name: Mock Chicken (Buddhist)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the chicken stock, soy sauce, sugar, sesame oil, and salt to a boil.
2. Cool the mixture.
3. Fold the dried bean-curd sheets into oblongs (approximately 4 by 8 inches).
4. Stack the sheets on top of each other, spooning the stock mixture between each layer.
5. Roll the stacked sheets into an oblong loaf and wrap in cheesecloth.
6. Steam the wrapped loaf on a rack over boiling water for 20 minutes.
7. Remove the cheesecloth and fry the loaf in deep oil until golden.
8. Drain and cut into 1/2-inch diagonal slices.
From "The Regional Cooking of China" by Margaret Gin and Alfred E. Castle.
